Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-15 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum-ranker-long dashboard shows two exceptional performers at the top: EACO ranks #1 with a score of 94.1, driven by extraordinary long-term returns of 1,955% over 10 years and 468% over 5 years, while maintaining perfect positioning above all major moving averages. CLMT follows closely with a 153% one-year return and 432% five-year return, showing consistent ratio momentum across timeframes with all five ratio passes. Both securities significantly outperform SPY across multiple horizons (EACO by 1,704% over 10 years, CLMT by 426%), suggesting they have captured distinct secular trends independent of broad market movements. EACO displays a "clean" momentum signal with a "strong_buy" flag and minimal negative correlation to traditional sectors like utilities (-0.186) and materials (-0.133), indicating idiosyncratic upside drivers. The data cuts off for CLMT's complete profile, but the visible metrics suggest both names warrant attention as long-term momentum leaders, though their extreme outperformance and concentrated positioning above all moving averages should be noted as factors to evaluate further.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
